seo.title: Showrooms — Broadway & Ludlow | Savery's of Broadway
seo.description: Visit a Savery's of Broadway showroom in Broadway or Ludlow. Premium fabrics, curated furniture, and considered interiors at the heart of the Cotswolds and the Welsh Marches.

hero.heading: Our showrooms
hero.subtitle: Visit Saverys in Broadway or Ludlow — places to see fabric, feel weight, and begin a conversation.

intro.heading: Two showrooms, one library
intro.body: Both showrooms hold the same fabric library, the same standards, and the same team. Choose whichever is closer to you, or visit both — the rooms are different, the materials are the same.

showrooms.name: Broadway
showrooms.description: Our Cotswolds home — set within the Cotswold Design Centre on Kennel Lane. Premium fabrics, curated furniture, and considered interiors.
showrooms.address: Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway, WR12 7DJ

showrooms.name: Ludlow
showrooms.description: On Tower Street in the heart of Ludlow, serving Shropshire, Herefordshire and the Welsh Marches with the same care, library, and team.
